China South China Sea Rocket Launch

Active
Indo-Pacific military signaling

Timeline

2026-04-10

China announced a South China Sea rocket launch for Saturday 7:30pm — coinciding with Vance Islamabad talks timing.

Sources: Reuters (Western), Global Times/Xinhua (China-aligned)
